title: cynanchum eggersii
intro: Cynanchum eggersii, also known as the Eggers' swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the dogbane family (Apocynaceae). It is a woody climber native to China and Taiwan. Cynanchum eggersii has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting relaxation, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for use in traditional medicine.
